title: Assessment and diagnosis of FASD among adults: a national and international systematic review - Canada.ca
content:

Mission: To promote and protect the health of Canadians through leadership, partnership, innovation and action in public health.
— Public Health Agency of Canada

## Supplementary Documentation
The Matrix is a table that includes over 100 citations of peer reviewed journal articles and practice-related documents, used by the authors to review, synthesize and critically analyze all the literature and data located during this review on adult diagnosis and assessment. To access this table in an alternative format please contact: The Division of Childhood and Adolescence at Tel: 1-613-952-1220, Fax: (613) 952-1556, Email: DCA.public.inquiries@phac-aspc.gc.ca
- For more information, contact the Division of Childhood and Adolescence
